overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter universe game showing a Slytherin student exploring a vintage bathroom with a ghost, ascending a gothic stone stairwell, and entering a Ravenclaw-style common room with tall windows, magical fireplace, and study areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage bathroom with stone sinks and arched stalls

events.description: translucent ghostly figure appears near the bathroom stalls
character turns and walks toward wooden exit door

agents.ego_description: walking around the bathroom, observing the ghostly figure and vintage fixtures

notable_agents.action: translucent ghost floating and drifting near the bathroom stalls

entered.detail: ornate white marble counter with multiple sinks and silver faucets
large arched mirror with decorative stone frame above the sinks
vintage wall-mounted lamps with warm yellow glow
vase with white and pink flowers on the counter
arched wooden stalls with hanging curtains
large cylindrical marble column in the room center

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a vintage bathroom with ornate marble sinks and warm lighting. A translucent ghost appears near the stalls, floating ethereally. The character walks around the room, observing the ghost and the stone architecture before heading toward a wooden exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic stone stairwell with wooden steps

events.description: exits bathroom through wooden door into narrow spiral stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase, passing framed portraits on the stone walls

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with carved railings ascending upward
rough-hewn stone block walls with warm sconce lighting
gilded frames with classical paintings hanging on the wall
medieval-style wall lamps casting warm light on stone

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom into a narrow, enclosed stairwell with stone walls and wooden steps. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates framed portraits as the character ascends the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with central fireplace and tall arched windows

events.description: exits stairwell into large open common room with high vaulted ceilings
fireplace ignites magically with blue and orange flames

agents.ego_description: entering the common room and approaching the central fireplace, observing the magical fire ignition

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading near the tall windows

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with wooden mantel and arched opening
tall arched windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass showing blue sky
upholstered high-back chairs arranged around the room
large patterned rug covering the stone floor
large stone carving of an eagle with spread wings on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious gothic common room with high ceilings and tall arched windows. The central fireplace magically ignites as the character approaches. Other students sit in armchairs near the windows, and a large eagle mural dominates the far wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with desks and bookshelves near windows

events.description: turns away from fireplace and walks toward window study area

agents.ego_description: walking past study desks and bookshelves, approaching a reading nook by the windows

notable_agents.action: student walking across the room toward the bookshelves

entered.detail: wooden desk with papers and a reading lamp
tall pile of leather-bound books on the floor
tall standing lamp with glowing shade
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelf filled with books
heavy blue fabric drapes framing the windows
arched wooden doorway leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the fireplace toward a study area with desks, stacks of books, and tall bookshelves. The camera passes other students and approaches a reading nook by the large windows, with blue curtains and wooden archways visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, ornate interior of a vintage bathroom into the ascending enclosure of a gothic stairwell. It begins amidst marble sinks and warm lighting, where the camera drifts past a translucent ghost floating ethereally near the stalls. As the character navigates the stone architecture, the scene shifts toward a wooden exit door that leads out of the room. The camera then transitions into a narrow stairwell, moving upward along wooden steps flanked by stone walls. Finally, the perspective climbs higher as warm light from wall sconces illuminates a series of framed portraits lining the ascent.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic common room that shifts from a central hearth to a quiet, scholarly study area. It begins as the character enters the spacious hall, where a central fireplace magically ignites upon their approach beneath high ceilings and tall arched windows. As the camera moves away from the warmth of the fire, the scene opens up to reveal students lounging in armchairs and a large eagle mural dominating the far wall. The perspective then glides toward a dedicated study zone filled with desks, stacks of books, and towering bookshelves. Finally, the movement leads into a secluded reading nook framed by blue curtains and wooden archways, settling beside the expansive windows.
